verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Mi khatpeuh khialin, Topa' thu palsatin, na kepsakna thu-ah ahi zongin, khapna nate' thu-ah ahi zongin a vengpa khemin, ahih kei leh a na sutin, a vengpa nengniamin
tua ahih kei leh a mang na khat mu-in tua thu-ah zuau-in a manloin kiciam a, mite a khialh theih ngeina khat peuhpeuhah
khialin a mawh ciangin amah in a suhte hita leh, a netniamna tawh a ngahte hita leh, amah a kikemsak na hita leh, a mang na a muh hita leh
a manloin a kiciamnasa na khat peuhpeuh hita leh loh ding hi. Amah in a cingin lohin seh nga-ah khat piak beh ding a, a mawhna hanga biakna a piak ni-in a neipa tungah pia ding hi
Tua ciangin a mawhna hanga a biakna ding, tuuhon lak pan a sitbaanglo tuutal khat, Topa' tungah a piak ding, a man ding nangma sehzah, amah in siampipa kiangah paipih ding hi
Siampipa in Topa' mai-ah ama-a' ding kilemna bawlsak ding a, mi khat a mawh theih ngeina khat peuhpeuhte-ah amah kimaisak ding hi,” a ci hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah

“Aaron leh a tapate thu pia in la, hih bangin ci in: Hih pen meihal biakna ngeina ahi hi. Meihal biakna pen biakna tau tunga meikhuk tungah zingsang mateng zan tawntung om ding a, tua biakna tau tungah mei kikuangsak den ding hi
Siampipa in a saihadial puan silhin, a saihadial pheituam tengin, biakna tau tungah meihal biakna mei in a kattum vutte la-in biakna tau pangah koih ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in a puante suahin puan dang silh ding a, giahphual pualam a siangtho mun khatah a vutte puakhia ding hi

Biakna tau tunga mei kikuangsak den ding a, kimitsaklo ding hi. Siampipa in zingsang simin a tungah sing cihin, meihal biakna a ngeina bangin a tungah koihin, thunuama biakna thau a tungah hal ding hi
Biakna tau tungah mei kikuangsak tawntung ding a, kimitsaklo ding hi
“Tua ciangin an tawh biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi. Aaron' suante in biakna tau mai, Topa' mai-ah pia ding uh hi
Mi khat in, biakna tau tungah a om an tawh biakna annel khutdim khat, a sathau leh a paknamtui khempeuh tawh la-in, Topa-a' dingin a gim namtui, phawkna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi
Aaron leh a tapate in a omlai teng ne ding uh hi. A siangtho mun khatah silngo sawhlohin ne ding uh a, kikhopna buktual sung mun khat hi ding hi

Tua pen silngo sawhin a ki-em hilo ding hi. Meihal biakna hong kipiakna sung panin amau' tanh dingin ka piaksa ahi hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna leh mawhna hanga biakna bangin a siangtho pen ahi hi

Na khang tawntung uha dingin thu hong kipiak mah bangin, Topa' tungah meihal biakna a kipiakna panin Aaron' suante lakah pasal peuhmah in tuate ne thei ding hi. Tuate a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Aaron leh a suante sathau a kinilh ni-in Topa' tungah hih bangin biakna kipia ding hi: An tawh biakna ngeina bangin annel lawh khat, alang zingsangin, alang nitakin pia ding hi
Tua pen beelpei tung khatah sathau tawh kibawl ding hi. An tawh biakna mah bangin limtakin helsa leh balnensa-in na paipih ding a, Topa-a' ding a gim namtui dingin na pia ding hi
Aaron' suante sung panin amah a laih dingin sathau a kinilh siampipa in, thu a kipiaksa mah bangin Topa' tungah pia ding a, a vekpi-in kihal ding hi
Siampipa in an tawh a biakna peuhmah a vekpi-in kihal ding a, kinelo ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Aaron leh a tapate tungah hih bangin gen in: Khialhna hanga biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi. Meihal biakna a kigawhna mun Topa' mai-ah khialhna hanga biakna kigo ding a, tua pen a siangtho pen ahi hi
Khialhna hanga biakna a pia siampipa in kikhopna buktual sung a siangtho mun khatah ne ding hi
A sa a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi. Puan tungah a si a kithehkhak ciangin, a siangtho mun khatah tua si a kithehkha pen kisawp ding hi
Tua ciangin a kihuanna leibeel kisukham ding hi. Ahih hangin taubeelin a kihuan ahih leh a beel kikiatin tui sungah kisawp siang sitset ding hi
Siampite' lak panin pasal peuhmah in ne thei ding uh hi. Tua in a siangtho pen ahi hi
Ahih hangin siangtho munah kilemna bawlna dingin kikhopna buk sungah a kipaipih si a kilak khiatna, khialhna hanga biakna sa kinelo ding a, mei tawh kihal ding hi.
